ops.title: Retrofit prek rendered config: cookie-sync + write-like-me (deferred, trees held)
ops.description: Both repos aborted the 2026-07-16 prek retrofit sweep with parked_on_non_trunk: their working copies are parented behind main with concurrent sessions' in-flight edits riding in @ (write-like-me: ML harness/dataset work; cookie-sync: go.sum churn + consent-fix/bundle + authkit-migration bookmarks). Do NOT rebase their @ — wait until each tree is parked on trunk, then re-dispatch the retrofit workflow script (session c40ec844's workflows/scripts/prek-fleet-retrofit-wf_a8a384ad-9fe.js) with args {"only": ["<repo>"]}, or follow the runbook manually: layout.toml importing cc-skills:precommit-base + language fragment, rm old config, FULL cc-guides render, check, uvx prek run --all-files hygiene (clean tree only), ship scoped with --bookmark trunk. See cc-notes note 01720869 for the model + gotchas.

ops.text: cookie-sync and write-like-me each have a rendered .pre-commit-config.yaml (marker line 1, repo: builtin present), cc-guides check green, CI green on the retrofit commit
